review_text:
These earbuds are a disaster if you have small ears. They are bulky and dig straight into the thin cartilage at the entrance of the ear. Within minutes they become painful ,not “slightly uncomfortable” but genuinely sore and irritating.
I tried the smallest tips, different angles, everything. nothing helped. The problem isn’t the tips, it’s the huge plastic body.
The case looks nice, but that’s the only good thing I can say. I definitely wouldn't recommend them to anyone with smaller ears.
Also the color is lighter than what appears in the photos.

review_text:
Okay, so I recently got my hands on this storage box, and I've gotta say, I'm pretty impressed. First off, the size is perfect. It's not too big, not too small, just right for storing all sorts of stuff – from clothes and shoes to books and random knick-knacks. It's also super sturdy. I've loaded it up with some heavy items, and it hasn't even flinched.

One of the things I really appreciate is the design. It's got a simple, clean look that fits in well with any decor. it's easy to open and close. Plus, it's stackable, which is a huge space-saver. I've got a few of these now, and they're neatly stacked all my clothes keeping everything organized.

Overall, this storage box is a winner. It's practical, well-made, and looks good too. If you're looking for a reliable storage solution, I'd definitely recommend giving this one a try. You won't be disappointed!

item_title: The Derma Co 4% Ceramide Barrier Repair Moisturizer-50gm

review_text:
I recently bought this moisturizer from Daraz, and honestly — it has become my absolute favorite during my healing journey. 🧴✨

My skin had been through a rough patch with barrier damage, dryness, and sensitivity. I was desperately looking for something gentle yet effective — and this one delivered! The texture is super lightweight, non-greasy, and absorbs like a dream. No sticky feeling at all, just soft, nourished skin.

What I love most is how calming and soothing it feels. With consistent use, I’ve noticed my skin feels hydrated all day, less irritated, and just overall healthier. It pairs really well with the rest of my routine too — no pilling or clashes.

I’ve tried many moisturizers, but this one stood out because it didn’t just sit on my skin — it repaired it. The ceramides and niacinamide in it actually helped rebuild my skin barrier and brought my glow back. 🌸💧

If you're someone who’s struggling with dryness, a damaged barrier, or just wants a no-nonsense, effective moisturiser I’d highly recommend giving this one a try. I’m so glad I trusted this — worth every rupee!

🩷 Rating: 5/5 from me!
